mapper.sql: gi.id AS image_id, gi.goods_id AS goods_id, g.title AS goods_title, g.description AS goods_description, u.id AS seller_id, u.nickname AS seller_nickname, gi.image_url AS image_url, gi.sort_order AS sort_order, gi.audit_status AS audit_status, gi.audit_remark AS audit_remark, gi.audited_by AS audited_by, gi.audited_at AS audited_at, gi.created_at AS created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM goods_image_do gi JOIN goods_do g ON g.id = gi.goods_id JOIN users u ON u.id = g.seller_id WHERE (#{status} IS NULL OR gi.audit_status = #{status}) ORDER BY gi.created_at ASC, gi.id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM goods_image_do gi WHERE (#{status} IS NULL OR gi.audit_status = #{status})

SELECT
FROM goods_image_do gi JOIN goods_do g ON g.id = gi.goods_id JOIN users u ON u.id = g.seller_id WHERE gi.id = #{imageId}

SELECT id AS user_id, nickname, avatar_url, avatar_audit_status, avatar_audit_remark, avatar_audited_by, avatar_audited_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE (#{status} IS NULL OR avatar_audit_status = #{status}) ORDER BY updated_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM users WHERE (#{status} IS NULL OR avatar_audit_status = #{status})
SELECT id AS user_id, nickname, avatar_url, avatar_audit_status, avatar_audit_remark, avatar_audited_by, avatar_audited_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE id = #{userId}
